task_completion.description: Log into the EMR system as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EMR dashboard is visible with the user logged in as 'admin' (usually visible in the top right corner or user profile menu).

task_completion.description: Locate and select the correct patient
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart or active patient banner displays 'Eulalia Hammes' and optionally the DOB '1974-04-14'.

task_completion.description: Set the initial appointment date and time
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the appointment scheduling form, the date is set to April 6, 2026 (2026-04-06) and the time is set to 09:00 AM.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct reason for the appointment
task_completion.visual_evidence: The reason, category, or comments field in the appointment form contains the text 'Smoking Cessation Counseling'.
The repeat/recurring section of the appointment form is activated, set to repeat 'Weekly' (or every 1 week/7 days), and configured for a total of 4 occurrences (or ending on April 27, 2026).

task_completion.description: Confirm the recurring series was successfully saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the appointments were saved, OR the calendar view shows the scheduled appointments for Eulalia Hammes on the correct dates (April 6, 13, 20, 27) at 09:00 AM.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to schedule the appointments
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the EMR web interface (clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than terminal windows executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual EMR application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window shows the EMR system (e.g., OpenEMR) and not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser developer console or DOM inspector being open to manually alter the calendar display or inject success messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Eulalia Hammes (DOB: 1974-04-14). The initial appointment must be on Monday, April 6, 2026, at 09:00 AM. The recurring series must be weekly for exactly 4 visits, which corresponds to the dates: April 6, April 13, April 20, and April 27, 2026. The appointment reason must include 'Smoking Cessation Counseling'.
